apiBaseUrl.title: Batch API Endpoint URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Full URL of the batch API endpoint that accepts POST requests with multiple values. Example: https://api.example.com/v1/batch-lookup

lookupField.title: Lookup Field
lookupField.description: Base field name used for aggregation. The function reads from '<field>_batch' (the aggregated array). Example: 'src_ip' reads from 'src_ip_batch' created by the upstream Aggregation function.

enrichPrefix.title: Enrichment Field Prefix
enrichPrefix.description: Prefix for enrichment fields. These become arrays that the downstream Unroll function splits back into individual events.

apiKey.title: API Key / Token
apiKey.description: API key or token for authentication. Leave empty for no auth.

bodyTemplate.title: Request Body Template
bodyTemplate.description: Custom JSON body template. Use {lookup_values} where the array of IPs/values should go. Leave empty for default format: {"ips": ["8.8.8.8", "1.1.1.1"]}. Example: {"searchParameters": {lookup_values}, "responseFields": ["accountName", "resourceName"]}

responseMatchField.title: Response Match Field
responseMatchField.description: Field name in each result object that matches back to the lookup value (e.g., 'ipAddress', 'ip', 'query'). Used when the API returns results as an array of objects. Leave empty if API returns results in same order as request or keyed by lookup value.

allowSelfSigned.title: Allow Self-Signed Certificates
allowSelfSigned.description: Enable for internal APIs with self-signed SSL certificates
